sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
திருவான்மியூர் திகழ் திரிபுர சுந்தரி மகிழ்
மருந்தீசா வருந்துவோர் வினை களையும் வள்ளலே
sections.translit:
thiruvAnmiyUr thigazh thiripura sundhari magizh
marundhIsA varundhuvOr vinai kaLaiyum vaLLalE
sections.en: Lord Marundheeswara, one who pleases the goddess Thripurasundhari residing in Thiruvanmiyur, thou art merciful, eliminating the suffering of all troubled souls.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
விஷமருந்தி வையத்துயர் துடைத்து நெஞ்சில்
கறை கொண்ட இறையே காருண்ய ப்ரபோ
sections.translit:
vishamarundhi vaiyatthuyar thudaitthu nenjil
kaRai konda iRaiyE kAruNya prabhO
sections.en: You are the compassionate one who drank poison to alleviate the miseries of the universe, and in the process obtained a permanent stain on your throat owing to the toxicity of the poison.

sections.label: Charanam
sections.ta:
தளர்ந்த வயதினிலே தனிமரமாய் தத்தளிப்போர்க்கும்
குழந்தைகள் போக்கினிலே குமுறி அழுபவர்க்கும்
தீராத நோயுற்றார் என்றே தீர்மானம் ஆனவர்க்கும்
தனி மருந்தான தயாபரனே தன்னேரிலா தவக்கொழுந்தே
sections.translit:
thaLarndha vayadhinilE thanimaramAy thatthaLippOrkkum
kuzhandhaigaL pOkkinilE kumuRi azhubavarkkum
thIrAdha nOyutRAr endRe thIrmAnam Anavarkkum
thani marundhAna dhayAparanE thannErilA thavakkozhundhE
sections.en: You are the singular medicament to aged, desolate people; people who incessantly cry due to the conduct of their children; people who have been declared as untreatable with terminal diseases. Perhaps you were birthed from our penance. You are the savior and the compassionate companion of the distraught. Author’s Note This song is in praise of Marundeeswarar/ Palvannanathar of Thiruvanmiyur Temple with Thripurasundari as Lord’s consort. Lord Siva who consumed the Haala Hala poison to save the universe from the potent toxin became blue throated Lord or Neelakantan when Devi used her hand to chock his throat and arrest the poison from entering his body. He is addressed here as provider of unique medicines. It is in this sthalam Siva taught sage Agasthiya uniqueness of various herbs and their therapeutic applications. Hence the name Marundeeswarar for the presiding deity in this shrine. Marundeeswarar temple sthalapuranam
